analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet stresses solidarity and mutual respect as unifying European values during COVID-19 and as emergency measures are lifted, and points to a Joint European Roadmap. Evaluation: EU1 (EU successful story) – implicit positivity but no historical reflection or overcoming past traumas; not clearly supported. EU2 (EU is united) – explicitly emphasizes solidarity and unity across the EU in the crisis and beyond; supported. EU3 (EU useful for its citizens) – references a concrete Joint European Roadmap, implying coordinated EU policy/action to manage lifting measures, which serves citizens; supported. EU4 (avant-garde actor) – no claim of pioneering leadership; not supported. EU5 (global champion of fair causes) – not about human rights leadership globally; not supported. EU6 (contributes to a better world) – focus is internal EU COVID-19 management, not global contribution; not supported. Conclusion: EU2 and EU3 apply.
